jobs.ai_meta_description: DRDO CEPTAM 11 Recruitment 2026: Eligibility, Salary, & Selection Process.
jobs.ai_overview: Agar aap bhi is bharti ka intezar kar rahe the, toh aapke liye acchi khabar hai. Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) ne CEPTAM 11 Recruitment 2026 ke liye 760+ senior posts ki bharti announce ki hai. Is bharti ke liye, aapko senior technical assistant ke liye Bachelor ka degree ya diploma ke saath related trade ka certificate hona chahiye.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Iss bharti ka avasar kheenchne ke liye aapko pahle 18 jun 2026 ke tarik par 28 varsh ka umra ka hona chahiye. Ye competition level ka mukhya kaarak hai. Aapko vacancy details ki jarurath hogi. Ismein Senior Technical Assistant STA - B 561 aur Technician - A (Tech A) 203 posts ki vacancies hain. Ye bhi yehi kaarana hai ki aapko syllabus aur pattern ka accha pata hona chahiye. Aur unki difficulty level ka analysis karna zarooret hai.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Iss Bharti ka avasar wale aayuwar 18 aur 28 ke beech hon. Yeh unka qualification degree ya related trade ki diploma honi chahiye. Ismein aapko age aur gender ke koi baap naa ho. Lekin yeh bhi yeh kaarana hai ki aapko is qualification ka saath saath related trade ka certificate bhi hona chahiye. Iska arth yeh hai ki agar aap 10th ka exam pass kar chuke hain, to aapko ITI certificate milna zaroori hai.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Preparation tips yaad rakhen: 1. Syllabus padhe aur isko practice karein. 2. Online resources ka upyog karen. 3. Mock tests lein aur apni performance ka self-evaluation karein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Salary insights ko dekhte hue, DRDO ke employees ko in-hand salaray ki shuruwaat ke bare mein yeh bataya gaya hai ki iska minimum limit 25000/- hai aur maximum 90000/- ka limit hai.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Job profile anubhav karein: Ye senior technical assistants aur technicians aise karyawaalon ka kaam karte hain jo DRDO ke sahyog ke liye karyon ko tay karate hain. Ismein unki shiksha aur kaushal ki jarurat hoti hai.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Selection strategy ko pate hue, aapko iske 2 stage hain. Pehele stage mein aapko online computer-based test clear karna hoga. Iske baad, aapko interview ke liye call mil sakta hai. Is interview mein aapko apne kaushal aur shiksha ka proof dene ki jarurat hogi.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: How to apply online rewrite yaad rakhen: 1. Official website pe jaayein aur apply online button pe click karein. 2. Registration form bharne ke liye required documents upload karein. 3. Online test ke liye registration karein aur pay fee. 4. Interview ke liye call lein aur interview ke liye taiyaar ho jayein.

textSections.section: How to Fill / How to Apply
content: OTR Instruction : SSC has started one-time registration on its new website SSC.GOV.IN. Candidates who have not yet done OTR registration on the new website will be able to apply for any recruitment only after completing the registration.

Staff Selection Commission SSC Are Issued Combined Graduate Level CGL Exam 2025 Notification and Invited Online Application Form for the SSC Graduate Level Recruitment 2025 Candidate Can Apply Online for 09/06/2025 to 04/07/2025.

Photo Instruction : SSC has made a big change in the application process. Now the photo of the candidate will be uploaded live, that too through webcam or through the official SSC App. The candidate has to take care that he looks straight ahead in the photo and the background should also be light/white.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Hand Writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID, Thumb, Proof, Etc.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed.
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.

jobs.title: Haryana Roadways Group D Recruitment 2026, Apply For 460 Posts
jobs.age_relaxation_notes: age relaxation will be given as per the rules
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://hkrnl.itiharyana.gov.in/
Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage.
First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password.
After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position.
Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable).
Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking].
Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors.
After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

faqs.question: What is the application fee, and how can it be paid?
faqs.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is ₹ 250/-. For SC/ST/Female candidates, it is ₹250/-. The fee can be paid online via Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for this?
faqs.answer: The last date to fill out the online form is July 2026.

faqs.question: How do I apply for this recruitment?
faqs.answer: You will need to apply online.

jobs.ai_overview: Aap sabhi job aspirants ke liye yah duniya ki sabse badi khushkhabri hai! Haryana Roadways Group D Recruitment 2026 me 460 posts ke liye apply karne ka moka mil raha hai! Isse aapke liye itna bada avasar hai. Taza jobs ka notice aap sabhi ko mil gaya hoga, aur yah pata lag gaya hoga ki yeh recruitment Haryana ki Sarkari Naukri hai jismein aap logon ka chayan hoga. Tension mat, is article me aapko sabhi details aur tips milti rahegi.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Is recruitment mein aap sabhi ko Haryana Roadways department ki jobs milti hain, jahan aap Group D posts ka chayan ke liye apply kar sakte hain. 460 posts ke liye aapko apply karne mein lagbhag kitne din lagne chahiye hain? Agar aapki umra group D ke liye purna hai, toh yah pehle se hi ek badi cheez hai. Competition bhi bahut zyada hai, lekin agar aapne syllabus aur strategy ka achha plan rakha hoga, toh aap yeh exam easily clear kar sakte hain. Competition level aapko kaha se pata laga sakta hai? Aapko jo syllabus diya jayega, usmein aapko jyada focus karne ki jarurat hai. Syllabus mein kai tricky question hote hain, jinka answer aapko lagbhag pehle se hi pata hona chahiye.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Yadi aapka age 18-42 ke beech hai, aur aap graduate hain, toh aapko is job ke liye apply karke apply karne ki jarurat hai! Haryana Roadways Group D Recruitment 2026 - Online Application Form, Syllabus, Exam Date, Eligibility Criteria, Online Apply Direct Link. Yeh pata lagana bahut important hai ki aapko koi visheshta ya anubhav ki jarurat hai ki nahin. Aapko jo qualification diya jayega, uske sath hi aapko apply karne ka moka milega.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Agar aap is recruitment ke liye apply karne ka moka le rahe hain, toh aapko pehle syllabus se judi study karne ki jarurat hai. Yeh syllabus aapko pehle se hi pata hona chahiye. Iske madhyam se aapko exam mein kya sawal aane hain yah samjh me aa jayega. Yeh syllabus aapko direct recruitment website par milti hogi. Ismein aapko kaafi saari details milti hain, jo aapko exam preparation ke liye achha idea degi.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Aap ko is recruitment se jo salaray milen ge, use ye pata chala jayega - Haryana Roadways Group D Recruitment 2026 Salary, Pay Scale, Job Profile, Allowances, and Career Growth. Yeh salary aapko aapne karya ki anubhav aur qualification ke madhyam se milengi. Yeh salaray aapko regular salary, DA, and MA ki rupayen mein milti hain. Regular salary aapko monthly milti hai. DA and MA ki rupaye bhi monthly milte hain.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Yeh pata lagana bhi bahut important hai ki kya aap Group D posts ke liye apply kar rahe hain? Iske liye aapko pehle Group D posts ka job profile samjhna padega. Yeh job profile aapko direct departmental website par milti hogi. Yeh job profile mein aapko jo karya karna padta hai, usko aapne daily routine mein samajhne ki jarurat hai. Isi tarah aap Group D posts ke liye apne visheshta ko aur bhi achhi tarah se show kar paenge.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Yadi aap is recruitment ke liye apply karne ka moka le rahe hain, toh aapko syllabus par focus karne ki jarurat hai. Aapko syllabus se judi study karne ki jarurat hai. Iske madhyam se aapko exam mein kya sawal aane hain yah samjh me aa jayega. Aapko syllabus ko aasani se samajhne ki jarurat hai. Yahan aapko sabhi topics kuch pustakon ka aadhaans lene ka suggestion chal raha hai. Aapko sabhi sawal ka answer yaad rakhe.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Aage badhte rehne ke liye Haryana Roadways Group D Recruitment 2026 me online apply karne ke liye, aapko departmental website par visit karna hoga. Agar aapke pas internet hai, toh aap online registration kar sakte hain. Online registration ke dauran aapko apne details aur qualification ka record banaye. Aapko is dauran aapke pas yeh sabhi paise honge jo registration fees ke liye lagege. Online registration aapke pas 10 din ka time hogi. Yeh online registration aap departmental website se kar sakte hain.

jobs.ai_h1: NTPC Asisstant Chemist Trainee Vahancy 2026: Abhi Online Form, Kya Aap Pehle Se Jante Hain?
jobs.ai_title: NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Vacancies 2026 - Apply Online Now
jobs.ai_meta_description: NTPC kisi bhi Naujawan ya Mahila ko Assistant Chemist Trainee vahancy ki pasand kiya kare, yaha pahlu se jankari de di gayi hai, aap online apply kar sakte hai aapko kya chahiye?
jobs.ai_overview: Kya aap bhi NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee vahancy ki tayyari kar rahe hain? Yadi haan to aapko ye sab jankari padhni hogi, is vahancy ka apply online karna hai, jo ki 26 June se 22 July tak kiya ja sakta hai. Yeh vahancy 10th class ka candidate hain, jinka agle saal me 12th ka exam dene hain. Aap 18 se 27 varsh ki umar ke hain aur apne sabhi aarthik vistrit karta hai. Yeh aapke liye acchi khabar hai, agar aap NTPC ki nayi vahancy ko wait kar rahe the, toh ab aap online form bharein.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Yeh vahancy tab me bharne ke liye uplabdh hi nahi hain. Agar aapke pas yeh qualification hai, to aap online form bharein. Lekin agar aapke paas koi problem hai, toh pehle usse solve karein. Agar aap 21st April se 24 April ke beech apply karen, to aapko 1st April se 24 April tk ki taarikh ki jaankari hamee pass hogi. Yeh vahancy ko 2:30PM tak pehle apply karnaa hoga, yeh vahancy kee sabhi jankari kee jaankari hamee pass hogi, jaise ki aapka post code, job location, age limit, vacancy details, aarthik vishist, ki aarthik vistrit hai ya nahi, job profile, ki aapka kya karna hoga, selection strategy, ki kya aapko syllabus ya paper solution ka samna karna padega, aarthik avadhi, kya aapko kis post code par aana hoga, kya aapko kis state me job karna hoga, kya aapko ki job profile ka kya rupa hoga jaise post code, job location, age limit, vacancy details, aarthik vishist, ki aarthik vistrit hai ya nahi, aur baki sabhi jankari hamee pass hogi.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Yeh vahancy ke liye apply karne ke liye, aapko in sabhi sharto ke paas hona hoga: 18-27 varsh umar ki, 10th class aapka pass hona chahiye aur 12th class ka exam aapke paas 10 mahine ka hai, aur apne sabhi documents uplabdh hona chahiye. Agar aapko ye sab shart hain, to aap apply karein.

jobs.ai_h1: RVUNL Bharti 2026: J.E, Jr Assistant, Jr Accountant Recruitment: Eligibility, Form Fill-up aur Apnaavishesh
jobs.ai_title: RVUNL JE, Jr Assistant, Jr Accountant Recruitment 2026: Eligibility aur Apnaavishesh
jobs.ai_meta_description: RVUNL Bharti 2026: JE, Jr Assistant, Jr Accountant Recruitment ke liye Eligibility check karein, Form Fill-up ki jaankari aur Apnaavishesh jaanchen.
jobs.ai_overview: Agar aap bhi is RVUNL Bharti ka intezar kar rahe the, toh yeh khushkhabar hain ki aap ka wait khatm ho gaya hai! Rajasthan Vasudha Venjan Nigam Limited (RVUNL) ne JE (Junior Engineer), Jr Assistant aur Jr Accountant Bharti ke liye anavadi notification jari ki hai. Is Bharti mein apane career ko badhane ke liye apne visheshtayein ko darshiyein.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Is Bharti ke liye apply karne ke liye aapki umr shesh 24-40 varsh honi chahiye. Yahi nahi, apki education mein diploma/ BE/ B.Tech ya 10+2 with ICAI/ ICSI certification ka hona zaruri hai. Aapko pata hai ki RVUNL ki competition khatarnak hai, isliye apni preparation shuru karne se pahle sabse pehle aapko apni eligibility chekein aur phir hi apply karein.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Is Bharti ke liye apply karne ke liye kya kya kaaryakram hai? Pehle, aapko Rajasthan ke residency certificate ka avashyakta hai, jismein aapke parenton ko bhi Rajasthan se sambandhit karna zaroori hai. Iske alava, aapko apne qualifications (diploma/ BE/ B.Tech ya 10+2 with ICAI/ ICSI certification) ka upyog karna hoga. Agar aap ye sab cheejein pehle se hi taiyar karte hain, toh aap RVUNL Bharti 2026 ke liye apply kar sakte hain.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Form bharte waqt in baaton ka khas dhyan rakhein - apne application form mein sahi jankari daalo, apne qualifications aur experiences ka accurate vishleshan karo, aur phir hi apply karein. Iske alava, aapki written examination preparation ke liye, apko RVUNL syllabus ki jaan leni honi chahiye, aur apni preparation ko time pe time par badhayein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Agar aap RVUNL Bharti 2026 mein khatm hone ka shubhkaam hain, toh aapko ek lamba career rahna hai. Aapko pata hai ki RVUNL ke employee ko in-hand salary, allowances aur benefits mile hain. Iske alava, aapke long-term career mein promotion ke chances bhi hain, lekin yeh shuruaat karte samay hi kuchh samay lagega.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Agar aap RVUNL mein khatm hone ke liye selected hote hain, toh pahle aapko JE (Junior Engineer), Jr Assistant ya Jr Accountant ki daily routine ko samjhna padega. Aapko pata hai ki aapke karyakal mein account management, administration aur technical tasks ho sakte hain.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Is Bharti ki syllabus aur selection process ko khatm hone ke liye aapko RVUNL ke syllabus ki jaan leni honi chahiye, aur aapke karyakal mein kya kya tasks aayenge. Iske alava, ek acchi preparation ke liye aapko RVUNL ke pattern se aaraam dekhna zaroori hai.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Form fill-up karte samay is tarah ka kadam uthayein - pehle apne personal details daalo, phir qualifications aur experiences daalo, aur phir apply karein. Iske alava, aapko apne documents ka upyog karna zaroori hai, jaise ki PAN card, aadhar card aur passbook.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya main RVUNL Bharti 2026 ke liye apply kar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, agar aapko eligible hua hai aur aap apne qualifications aur experiences ka upyog karte hue apply karte hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapke application form mein passport size photo aur signature ko aapke documents ki madad se scan karke upload karna hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapke qualifications ki verification aapke application form mein di gayi jaankari aur RVUNL ki jaanch ke baad hongi.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapko aapne application form mein aapke qualifications, experiences aur personal details ka upyog karne ke alava aapke documents ka bhi upyog karna zaroori hai, jaise ki PAN card, aadhar card aur passbook.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapka passport size photo ko scan karne ke liye aapko high-quality scanner ya camera ka upyog karna hoga, jisse aapka photo saaf aur clear ho jaye.

jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Yeh vacancies BIRAC ka Bharat aur international project mein karya karna hoga. Is post ke liye aapko ek Bachelor's degree ka padhak hoga aur 3-7 years ke experience ke sath aapko aapne liye perfect post khojo.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Is naukri ke liye aap apna eligibility check karo. Agar aap ke paas required degree aur experience hai toh aap online apply kar sakte hain. Aapke paas 5-10 ke experience ke sath 35-40 ke age ke aap apna career badha sakte hain.

jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Is naukri ke liye aapko ek syllabus ke sath aapke subject ke liye practice karna padega. Aapke paas ek guidebook ke sath aapke subject ke liye practice karna hoga. jobs.ai_h1: SBI SCO Bharti 2026, Eligibility, Online Apply Kaise Karen?
jobs.ai_title: SBI SCO Recruitment 2026 | Eligibility & Online Apply Kaise Karna Hain
jobs.ai_meta_description: SBI SCO Bharti 2026 notification out now, eligible candidates apply online through SBI website, sabja details dikhayi gaye hain.
jobs.ai_overview: Agar aap bhi SBI SCO Bharti 2026 ka intezar kar rahe the, toh aapke liye acchi khabar hai! SBI ne 50 poston ke liye recruitment ki ghoshna ki hai, aap bhi ismein aavaz dena chahte hain to yahaan jaaein aur apni application online submit karein. Is notification mein age limit 21-30 saal, total vaccancies 50 hai aur application last date 2023-12-31 hai.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: SBI SCO Bharti 2026 ki competition bahut kam hai aur aapka ek hi chance hai apply karna. Agar aap 21 saal se kam nahin hain aur SSC exam mein 55% saath aaya hai, toh aapko apply karne ka mukaam milega. Form bharte waqt in 4 key points ka khas dhyan rakhein: 1) aapki application complete aur sahi dikhayi jaaye. 2) aapka age limit sahi hai ya nahin. 3) aapka education qualification match karta hai ya nahin. 4) aapne online registration pay ka khas dhyan rakha hai.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Yeh SBI SCO Bharti 2026 kisi bhi shreni ki candidates ke liye nahi hai, kyunki ismein age limit specific hai aur education qualification bhi specific hai. Agar aap 21-30 saal ke uplabdhi hain, SSC se 55% saath aaya hai aur 10th pass hain, toh aapko iska mauka mil sakta hai, aur agla criteria hai apki computer skills aur Hindi typing ka. Islye yeh job apnaane ke liye koi bhi candidate ka mahatvapoorn nishkarsh hai.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: SBI SCO Online Form jhunjhunapaani karne ka ek ekam avsar hai, isliye aapko yahaan kuch tip bata di gaye hain: 1) yahaan online registration karein, sabja information dikhayi gayi hai. 2) apne documents online sahi sahi dikhayein, photo aur sign ka khas dhyan rakhein. 3) apna address correct dikhayen, agar address change hua hai tou apply karne ke baad bhi change kar sakate hain. 4) apne application complete submit karein agar koi confusion hui ho to contact karein. 5) apne education certificate ki photo upload karein aur application fee pay karein.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Ye post ke liye salary khaaskar in-hand salary 25,000-30,000 rupaye tak ho sakta hai, aur iske sath-sath SBI bank ke benefits aur perks bhi milenge. Yeh job 5-7 years tak job dene ke baad promotion bhi milegi.  Agar aap job chhote dhang me aata hai to iske sambhaav 40,000 se zyada ki in-hand salary bhi ho sakta hai. In-hand salary ya allowance ke baare mein aap ko sarkari website par hi payne milengi.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Ye Sarkari Naukri ka job profile hoga, jismein aapko job pe bina kisi chetavani ki online karyvah karte huye apna kary dhoondhne jana hogi. Agar aapka computer skills aur hindi typing sahi hota hai, toh aap online work karke apna time aur kary bhi sahi kar sakte hain. Aapka work pe ka time aur kary ka saaf niveshayne hone per nazar hoga.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Yeh SBI SCO Exam jaisi hoga, jismein aapka syllabus aur filtering strategy sahi hona bahut zaroori hai, kyunki exam ki 50% maarkinng kuch hi sawal se hoti hai. Agar aap SSC ko aisa hua hai, toh apne syllabus aur filtering strategy ko saaf aur sahi dhang se banayein aur phir apply karein.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Agar aap is SBI SCO Bharti 2026 ka application online submit karna chahte hain, toh aapko pehle yeh link ya online apply kaha hai, tab yahaan online apply form aapka karykarta registration ke liye karyavahi hoga. Form bharne ke baad aapko payment ka karykarta karna hai, aapka application ka status online check kar sakte hain, yah 3 ghante tak karyavahi ho sakti hai, yah dhyan rakhte hain ki aapne last date tak 2-3 days ka marammat di jayein, aur phir apna online apply submit karein. Isliye yeh aapke sabjapati aur sahi online apply submit karne ke tareeke bata di gaye hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mere pass 12th ki padhai abhi bhi hai, yeh apply karna chahiye kya?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Na, aap 12th pass hokar abhi bhi apply nahi kar sakte, aapko to apni education qualification 10+2 complete karne ke baad apply karna hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapko SBI ka official website par jana hoga aur phir apply karne ke liye online form fill up karna hoga, sab details yahaan aapke saamne honge.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mere paas to 10th pass hai, lekin 10th pass ke baad se koi degree nahi. Aap mujhe apply karne ke liye kya bata sakte hain?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapke pass 10th pass ka certificate hai, ismein aap kai sarkari naukri ka eligibility dikhayein. Agar aapke pass diploma ya certificate hai, to yhi apply karna thoda mushkil ho sakte hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapko pehle 10th ki marksheet, 12th ki marksheet, degree aur caste certificate, yahaan satai jat ki sabja document aapka apply karne ke liye lagbhag lagenge, ya fir aapko ek sainik certificate ya army aur navy ke liye ek certificate lagbhag lage sakta hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: SBI SCO Bharti 2026 ka exam date kya hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Iska exam date aapka online registration ke baad 15 din ke andar hi aapko aapke mail ya online account me aayega, tab aapki yojana banana hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mere paas yadi online application fee nahi. Aap mujhe kya bata sakte hain?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Online fee ki jaankaari  apke account aur account ki jankari hai aap online account me jaake dekh sakte hai aur apne karyavahi ke liye aapke pass online apply fee ki jaankaari hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Agar aapki online application apply ke baad koi error ho gaya hai to aap online apply ke link ke sath hi online correction bhi kar sakte hain. Yahaan sab information aapka online correction process bata di gaye hain.

Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking].
Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors.
After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.

jobs.title: Jal Shakti Vibhag Dharampur Circle Recruitment 2026, Apply Now
jobs.age_relaxation_notes: age relaxation will be given as per the rules
selection_process: All received applications will be scrutinized. Shortlisted candidates will then be called for a Skill Test/Physical Test. Further information regarding the selection process will be released by the department.
how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or use the link below.
Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details.
Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.).
Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview.
Envelope: Also, attach a self-addressed envelope measuring 25 cm x 10 cm. If required in the notification.
The envelope containing the application should be superscribed “Application for the post of __________________________.”
Send it to the address given in the notification.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Candidate should have at least Matriculation (10th) with Certificate in the trade of ITI Electrician/Wireman/Diesel Mechanic/Pump Mechanic/Motor Mechanic/Pump Operator cum Mechanic from a recognized ITI OR Matriculation (10th) with Certificate in the trade mentioned above/Income Certificate under Skill Development Scheme of Government and Candidates belonging to Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe

Candidate should have at least Matriculation (10th) and ITI Certificate in the trade of Fitter & Plumber from a recognized ITI OR Matriculation (10th)/Income Certificate along with Certificate in the above-mentioned trade under Skill Development Scheme of Government, and Candidates who belong to Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe category should submit their category certificate (SC/ST).

Candidate must have minimum qualification of Middle Pass or equivalent from a school recognized by the State Government/Income Certificate, and candidates belonging to the Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe category should submit their category certificate (SC/ST).

faqs.question: What is the application fee, and how can it be paid?
faqs.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is ₹ 00/-. For SC/ST/Female candidates, it is ₹00/-. The fee can be paid online via Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.

how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or download it from the link below.

headings: HSSC CET Group D Syllabus 2026 Exam Pattern
Age Limit
Vacancy Details
HSSC CET Group D Syllabus 2026 Important Links

HSSC CET Group D Syllabus 2026 Exam Patt: Total Marks: 100
Time: 1 hour 45 minutes (105 minutes)
Negative Marking: No. However, if a question is left blank without selecting the 5th “Not Attempted” option, 0.95 marks may be deducted per question.
Language: Bilingual (English and Hindi), Offline OMR-based exam
HSSC CET Group D Syllabus 2026 In PDF
General Awareness:
(i) The test will include questions relating to India and neigh boring countries, especially pertaining to History, Indian Polity & Constitution, Art & Culture, Geography. (15% Weightage)
(ii) General Science (Physics, Chemistry and Biology).(15% Weightage)
Reasoning:

Alphabetical order, series, Coding-decoding, direction and distance, order and ranking, blood relation, analogy, classification, clock, calendar, mirror image, water image, syllogism, sitting arrangement, inserting the missing characters, statement and assumption, statement and conclusion, counting figures, Non-verbal series, analogy and classification.(10% Weightage)
Quantitative Ability:

The test will cover Number System, including questions on Simplification, Decimals, Fractions, Relationship between numbers. L.C.M., H.C.F., Ratio & Proportion, Percentage, roots, Average, Profit & Loss, Discount, Simple & Compound Interest, Mensuration, Partnership business, Mixture and Allegation, Time & Work, Time & Distance, Trigonometry, basic Algebra, Geometry. (15% Weightage)
English Language:

English Grammar, Spot the Error, Fill in the Blanks, Synonyms, Antonyms, Spellings/ Detecting mis-spelt words, Idioms & Phrases, Improvement of Sentences, Active/ Passive Voice of Verbs, Conversion into Direct/ Indirect narration, Shuffling of Sentence parts, tenses.(10% Weightage)
General Knowledge of Haryana:
General awareness which includes History, Literature, Geography, Economy, Civics, Polity, Environment, Art, Culture, Customs, Society, Current Affairs. Events etc. of Haryana (25% weightage)
Hindi Language:

वर्ण, स्वर, व्यंजन, शब्द, संज्ञा, सर्वनाम, विशेषण, क्रिया, क्रियाविशेषण, वचन, लिंक, कारक, काल, तद्भव-तत्सम, अलंकार, विकारी शब्द, अविकारी शब्द, पद, पदबद्ध, मुहावरे, लकोक्तियाँ, संधि, उपसर्ग, प्रत्यय, समास, पर्यायवाची, विलोम व अनेकार्थी शब्द, वाक्य शोधन, विरामचिन्ह, अनेक शब्दों के लिए एक शब्द. (10% Weightage)
Download PDF

The age relaxation will be given as per the rules.

jobs.ai_overview: Yuvak ya yuvaaton ke liye HSSC CET Group D 2026 ki pariksha mein bharti ho rahi hai. Is exam ki paheliyan aur samay-saat ke bare mein Haryana SSC ki jankari kiye gaye hain. Agar aap bhi is bharti ka intezar kar rahe the, toh aapke liye acchi khabar hai ki paheliyan aur samay-saat ki paheliyan is post ke madhyam se aapko maloom honge. Haryana SSC ne is exam ke liye paheliyan aur samay-saat ki jyada jankari ki hai, jo Haryana ke kshetra mein vyast huye yuvako ko apne liye kheechane me madad karegi.

General Awareness:
(i) The test will include questions relating to India and neigh boring countries, especially pertaining to History, Indian Polity & Constitution, Art & Culture, Geography. (15% Weightage)
(ii) General Science (Physics, Chemistry and Biology).(15% Weightage)
Reasoning:

Alphabetical order, series, Coding-decoding, direction and distance, order and ranking, blood relation, analogy, classification, clock, calendar, mirror image, water image, syllogism, sitting arrangement, inserting the missing characters, statement and assumption, statement and conclusion, counting figures, Non-verbal series, analogy and classification.(10% Weightage)
Quantitative Ability:

The test will cover Number System, including questions on Simplification, Decimals, Fractions, Relationship between numbers. L.C.M., H.C.F., Ratio & Proportion, Percentage, roots, Average, Profit & Loss, Discount, Simple & Compound Interest, Mensuration, Partnership business, Mixture and Allegation, Time & Work, Time & Distance, Trigonometry, basic Algebra, Geometry. (15% Weightage)
English Language:

English Grammar, Spot the Error, Fill in the Blanks, Synonyms, Antonyms, Spellings/ Detecting mis-spelt words, Idioms & Phrases, Improvement of Sentences, Active/ Passive Voice of Verbs, Conversion into Direct/ Indirect narration, Shuffling of Sentence parts, tenses.(10% Weightage)
General Knowledge of Haryana:
General awareness which includes History, Literature, Geography, Economy, Civics, Polity, Environment, Art, Culture, Customs, Society, Current Affairs. Events etc. of Haryana (25% weightage)
Hindi Language:

वर्ण, स्वर, व्यंजन, शब्द, संज्ञा, सर्वनाम, विशेषण, क्रिया, क्रियाविशेषण, वचन, लिंक, कारक, काल, तद्भव-तत्सम, अलंकार, विकारी शब्द, अविकारी शब्द, पद, पदबद्ध, मुहावरे, लकोक्तियाँ, संधि, उपसर्ग, प्रत्यय, समास, पर्यायवाची, विलोम व अनेकार्थी शब्द, वाक्य शोधन, विरामचिन्ह, अनेक शब्दों के लिए एक शब्द. (10% Weightage)

HSSC Sweeper Recruitment 2026 Frequently: Q1. HSSC CET Group D 2026 ka notification kab aayega?

HSSC CET Group D 2026 ka official notification April 2026 mein release hone ki ummeed hai. 3 April 2026 ko HSSC ne ek latest notice jaari kiya tha — jisme recruitment ki preparation ke baare mein update diya. Jaise hi notification aayegi, post turant update kar di jaayegi. hssc.gov.in regularly check karo ya hamara WhatsApp/Telegram join karo.
Q2. HSSC CET Group D 2026 mein total kitne posts hain?

HSSC CET Group D Recruitment 2026 mein approx. 8000 posts bharni hain — yeh Haryana government ke various departments mein Group D posts hain. Exact post-wise breakdown official notification aane par pata chalega.
Q3. HSSC CET Group D 2026 ke liye kya qualification chahiye?

Group D posts ke liye sirf 10th Class Pass hona zaroori hai kisi bhi recognized Board se. Age limit 18 se 42 saal hai — age calculation date 1 January 2026 hai. Haryana domicile ya residence certificate hona zaroori hai.
Q4. HSSC CET Group D 2026 ka selection process kya hai?

Selection process mein sirf 3 stages hain — (1) Written Exam (CET) — 100% weightage, koi interview nahi. (2) Document Verification. (3) Medical Examination. Written exam mein achha perform karna sabse zaroori hai — merit sirf CET marks se banayi jaayegi.
Q5. HSSC CET Group D 2026 ki application fee kitni hogi?

General, OBC aur EWS candidates ke liye fee ₹500 hogi. SC, ST aur PWD (Divyang) candidates ke liye fee ₹250 hogi. Fee online mode se pay karni hogi. Official notification aane par fee confirm karo — yeh change bhi ho sakta hai.
Q6. HSSC CET Group D Exam Pattern 2026 kya hai?

HSSC CET Group D exam mein objective-type questions hote hain. Syllabus mein General Awareness, Reasoning, Hindi, English, Mathematics aur General Science subjects shamil hote hain. Pichle saal ke pattern ke hisaab se total 100 marks ka paper hota hai. Detailed exam pattern official notification mein aayega.
Q7. HSSC CET Group D aur HSSC CET mains mein kya fark hai?

Bahut candidates confuse hote hain — HSSC CET (Group C ke liye) aur HSSC CET Group D (Group D ke liye) alag alag exams hain. Group D ke liye sirf 10th pass chahiye, jabki Group C ke liye generally 12th ya graduation chahiye. Group D exam sirf Group D posts ke liye qualify karta hai — Group C posts ke liye nahi.

headings: किन कर्मचारियों को फ़ायदा होगा?
ऑप्शन ऑनलाइन सबमिट करने होंगे।
एप्लीकेशन के लिए ज़रूरी तारीखें
कर्मचारियों का क्या होगा?
डिपार्टमेंट्स को निर्देश जारी

किन कर्मचारियों को फ़ायदा होगा?: यह निर्णय उन ग्रुप-D कर्मचारियों पर लागू होगा जिनकी नियुक्ति Advt. No. 04/2018 के तहत हुई थी या जिन्हें Compassionate Ground (अनुकंपा आधार) पर 28 मार्च 2018 से 31 मार्च 2020 के बीच नियुक्त किया गया था।
ऑप्शन ऑनलाइन सबमिट करने होंगे।: सरकार द्वारा कर्मचारियों को अपना विकल्प ऑनलाइन पोर्टल के माध्यम से भरना होगा। इसके लिए संबंधित कर्मचारियों को निर्धारित लिंक उपलब्ध कराया जाएगा और पंजीकृत मोबाइल नंबर के माध्यम से OTP आधारित लॉगिन करना होगा।
एप्लीकेशन के लिए ज़रूरी तारीखें: ऑनलाइन विकल्प भरने की प्रक्रिया 01 जुलाई 2026 से 15 जुलाई 2026 तक चलेगी। निर्धारित अवधि के भीतर विकल्प नहीं भरने वाले कर्मचारियों को कॉमन कैडर में बने रहने वाला माना जाएगा।
कर्मचारियों का क्या होगा?: जो कर्मचारी कॉमन कैडर में बने रहने का विकल्प चुनेंगे, वे ग्रुप-D एक्ट 2018 के प्रावधानों के अनुसार कार्य करेंगे। वहीं जो कर्मचारी कॉमन कैडर से बाहर जाने का विकल्प चुनेंगे, वे अपने संबंधित विभागों के सेवा नियमों के अंतर्गत कार्य करेंगे।
डिपार्टमेंट्स को निर्देश जारी: हरियाणा सरकार ने सभी प्रशासनिक सचिवों, विभागाध्यक्षों, मंडल आयुक्तों तथा उपायुक्तों को निर्देश जारी किए हैं कि पात्र कर्मचारियों को समय सीमा के भीतर इस प्रक्रिया में भाग लेने के लिए प्रेरित करें।

jobs.ai_h1: Haryana Group D Bharti 2026 ki Tazah Aaami Khabar - Apply Karein aur Jeeto!
jobs.ai_title: Haryana Group D Job Notification 2026 | Sarkari Naukri Portal
jobs.ai_meta_description: Haryana Group D Bharti 2026 ki tazah khabar aayi hai | Online apply karein aur apne 2026 ke future secure karein!
jobs.ai_overview: Yeh aapke liye acchi khabar hai, agar aap Haryana Group D bharti ki charcha kar rahe the! Haryana sarkar ne is bharti ke liye aam aavashyaktaayein apani karein. Form bharte waqt in baaton ka khas dhyan rakhein: yadi aapne 10th, 12th ya graduation ki degree puri kar li hai, aur aapka umr 18-35 ke beech hai, toh aap is form ko fill kar sakte hain.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Is bharti mein, aapko 120 questionon ka exam dena hoga, jismein 100 question common se aur 20 question specific (subject-wise) hongi. Iske baad, yadi aapka exam pass ho jata hai, toh aapko physical fitness test bhi dena padega. Agar aap yeh dono clear kar paate hain, toh aapko appointment letter milegi aur apne duty ke liye utar aap.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Yeh bharti ke liye kaun apply kar sakta hai? Agar aap yeh sawaal poch rahe hain, toh humein bataein ki yeh bharti usko mil sakti hai jo: - Haryana ke resident hain - 18-35 ke umr ke beech hain - Apne aavashyak pad ki education (10th, 12th ya grad.) puri kar chuke hain
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Is bharti ke exam ko clear karne ke liye, humein yeh 10 tips follow karne hain: 1. 120 questionon ke exam ko clear karnay ke liye, humein common aur subject-wise section ko alag-alag se practise karna hoga. 2. Exam ke time, humein samay ki jagah kuch pehle socho aur kuch pehle practice karo. 3. Hamar e mental fitness test ka bahut bada importance hain. Physical fitness ke liye, humein yoga, gym, aur outdoor activities practice karna hoga.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Yeh bharti ke baad, aapko yeh saari facilities milegi: Minimum in-hand salary: 18,000 - 65,000 p.m. Allowances: DA, TA, CA, HRA, CCA, etc. Long-term growth opportunities: Promotion ki sambhavna hain 5-10 varsh ke samay par
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Yeh bharti ke baad, aapko yeh karya kaun ka kar sakte hain: - Traffic management - Public transportation management - Municipal services - Disaster management - Public health services
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Is bharti ke selection process me, humein:  - Syllabus ko samajhna hoga - Filtering strategy ko banana hoga - Trick elements ko avoid karna hoga
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Yeh application form kaise bharne hai, iske liye: 1. Sarkari Naukri Portal par gaye, and 'Haryana Group D Bharti 2026' search karna hoga. 2. Yadi aapka form qualify karta hai, toh humein 1 minute mein form bharne aur submit karna hoga

jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://ccrum.res.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the application fee [Online – UPI / Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking]. Preview all details before submitting. Correct any errors. After final submission, note down the confirmation page/application number and be sure to take a printout.
jobs.jobs_info: CCRUM Vacancy 2026: The Central Council for Research in Unani Medicine (CCRUM), under the Ministry of AYUSH, Government of India, has issued a notification for the positions of Research, Nursing, Technical & Administrative. The recruitment drive comprises 176 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the CCRUM Vacancy 2026 official notification and apply before 31-07-2026, the last Date. Also, see all the information related to the post on the official website. All relevant information regarding the CCRUM Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.

faqs.question: What is the application fee, and how can it be paid?
faqs.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is ₹ 1500/-. For SC/ST/Female candidates, it is ₹00/-. The fee can be paid online via Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, or UPI.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for this?
faqs.answer: The last date to fill out the online form is 31-07-2026.

jobs.ai_h1: CCRUM Vacancy 2026: Agar Aap Bhi Kisi Se Bhi Post Ke Liye Prathmikta Ke Liye Khetra Bana Chaahte Hain, Phir Iski Zaroor Padhna.
jobs.ai_title: CCRUM Recruitment Notification 2026: Staff Nurse, MTS, and Various Posts
jobs.ai_meta_description: Ab kuchh sekunden me aapko is CCRUM vacancy 2026 ki saari jaankari bhi mil jaaegi!
jobs.ai_overview: Kya aapke paas apni career ki prathmikta ke liye ek naya avsar hai? Agar haan, to aaj ke is post mein hum CCRUM vacancy 2026 ki vajah batayenge. CCRUM ne varsh 2026 me ek nayaya avsar utariya hai, jismein Staff Nurse, MTS aadi poston ke liye vyakti dhundhe hue hain. Ab hum yeh saavdhani ke saath kheenche hain ki is vacancy ke baare mein kya hai aur iske liye aapko kyu padna chahiye.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Is CCRUM vacancy me aapko Staff Nurse, MTS aur anya posts ke liye vyakti dhundhe hue hain. Ye post kai aisi hain jismein vishesh yaun ki jaroorat hoti hai. Iske liye aapko koi bhi vishesh yaun ke liye upalabdhit vyakti hona jaroori hai. Vyaktiyon ki sankhya bahut gehra hui jisse competition bahut jyada hai.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Agar aap BSc Nursing ya B.Sc Nursing ki pariksha pass hue hain, to aap Staff Nurse ki post ke liye apply kar sakte hain. MTS post ke liye bhi aap apply kar sakte hain, agar aap BSc/Degree ke saath Haryana Board se 10+2 pass hain.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Form bharte waqt aapko pahle apni yaun ki pehchan karna hai. Iske liye aapko apne vishesh yaun ki practice karni hogi. Sath hi aapko apne khalini ki prakriya ko pashchimaaditi se samay par poora karne ka dhyan rakhein, taaki aapke liye koi bhi problem na aay.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Staff Nurse ke liye CCRUM ne fixed pay 35400/- rupay prapnot ki hai. MTS ki post ke liye bhi fixed pay 18000/- rupay prapnot ki hai. Iske alawa, aapko ye sabi bhi milegi: DA (Dearness Allowance), HRA (House Rent Allowance), and MA (Medical Allowance).
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Staff Nurse ko ICU, ICCU, OT, Matdand, aur anya sehat kendrao me kaam kartna hoga. Iske alawa, inhe shishu, shishu kendra, aur gurukulon me bhi kamana hoga. Staff Nurse ka karya dainik roj ko aapne vishay ke anusar hoga, jismein unhe shishuvargon ki pehchan karni hogi aur unki sehat ko behtar bana na hona hoga.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Staff Nurse ke liye exam paper me kai section honge, jismein Physics, Chemistry, Biology, and English shamil hain. MTS ke liye paper me General Knowledge, General English, Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry shamil hain. Vyaktiyon ko in exams me kuch ghanta samay milta hai lekin unhein samay par poori karna hoga, taaki aasani se aapko marks mil sakein.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: CCRUM vacancy 2026 ke liye aapko apna online apply karna hoga. Form karene ke liye aapki apne portal par jaakar apna vishay chunein aur apna satta karein. Apne khaline ki pehchan ke liye aapko apne vishay ke anusar aapne aavashyak documents ko jaanakari deni hogi.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya main apply kar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, aap apply kar sakte hain, agar aap ke paas BSc/Nursing ke saath apne anubhav aur yaun ki pehchan hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mujhe kaise aapko CCRUM vacancy 2026 mein apply karne ke liye khetra karna chahiye?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: CCRUM vacancy 2026 ki vacancy online form bhare ke liye hoga, jiske liye aapko apne vishay ke anusar apna vishay chuna hoga aur apne aavashyak documents ko jaanakari deni hogi.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya main apne documents ko online kaise bharega?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Apne documents ko online bharna ke liye aapko apne official portal par apne vishay ke anusar apna satta karna hoga. Jab aapke saath apne documents ho jae ga, tab aap ko apna form submit kar dena hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: CCRUM vacancy 2026 ke liye online apply karne ke liye kya kya aavashyak documents hain?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapko apne vishay ke anusar aapne aavashyak documents ko jaanakari deni hogi, jaise ki apna PAN card, aapna Aadhar card, aapne satta ka photo, aapne signature ka photo, aadi.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya main apne online apply ke liye anya ke liye online form kharid sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, aap apne online apply ke liye online form kharid kar aapka apply karsaktay hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: CCRUM vacancy 2026 ke liye online apply karne ke liye kuchh kuchh tips dena chahiye?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapko apna online apply online karne ke liye apna vishay chunke apna satta ka form bharna hoga. Tabhi aapka online apply ke liye apna khalini karsakta hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Agar aapke samay mein mere online apply rejected ho gaya ho to kya mera koi option hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, agar aapka online apply rejected hoa ho, to aap aapke khalini ko online jaanakari dena hoga. Iske baad aapko apne online apply ko fir se apply karna hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya main CCRUM vacancy 2026 ke liye online apply karsakti hoon,agar main BSC Nursing ke saath apna anubhav rakhti hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, aap aapka online apply karksakti hain. Lekin aapko apne BSC Nursing ke saath apne anubhav ko bhi online jaanakari dena hoga.

jobs.ai_h1: 7000+ Sarkari Naukri Vitaran Delhi Fire Service Recruitment 2026 Mein Shamil Hain!
jobs.ai_title: Delhi Fire Service Recruitment 2026: 7000+ Posts and Online Form
jobs.ai_meta_description: Delhi Fire Service Recruitment 2026 me 7000+ Posts hain. Form bharte wale candidates ke liye aapki pasand ki bharti hui, jabki bhumi parikshan ki tareeke aur prakriya par dhyan dein.
jobs.ai_overview: Agar aap bhi is bharti ka intezar kar rahe the, toh aapke liye acchi khabar hai! Is saal ki Delhi Fire Service Recruitment 2026 mein aapko 7000+ posts mil sakte hain. Aapke liye sarkari naukri, jo kisi bhi vyakti ke liye uplabdh aur majboot nishkarsh hain. To, aapko is bharti ki jarurat hai aur aapko online form bharne ka samay hai.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Yeh bharti khaas kar aapko ek majboot aur avsarpann nishkarsh dikhati hai. Lekin, yeh bharti ke liye kuch khas gunvatta bhi padti hai. Aapke liye, yeh bhi zaroori hai ki aapne apne vittiya samasya ko thoda bhi nahi kharaab karna hoga. Iske alaava, aapko apne vyaktitva aur sammelan bhi behtar karne chahiye.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Jo vyakti is bharti ke liye sahi hain, wo yeh hain: aapka upalabdhi keval vyaktigat vishayon par niyamit roop se nirbhar karke nahi hai, lekin inhein apni prathmikta aur avsarpannata ke sath jodna zaroori hai.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Form bharne se pehle apne vyaktigat vishayon par aakarshak rup se dhyan dena zaroori hai. Aapke liye, yeh bhi zaroori hai ki aapne apne vyaktitva aur sammelan ko behtar kar lein. Form bharne ke liye, aapko apne vyaktigat sambandhon ki vyakhya dene ke liye tay hai, jisme aapko apne parivaar, apne saathiyon, apne samuday aur anya sabhi vyakti ke liye kuch aakarshak bhaavanaaon aur sambandh bhi samajhne honge.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Yeh bharti mein aapko in-hand salary ki samanya aadhaar par lagbhag 50,000 se 80,000 tak ki sanchi milti hai. Lekin, ye sab kuch aapki vyaktigat sambandhon aur avasar par nirbhar kar sakta hai.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Agar aap is bharti mein chun liye jate hain, to aapki daily office/field duties ki prakriya yeh hoga ki aapko shahar mein fire brigade ke kary karte hue apne sathiyon ke saath sahaytaa pradaan karna hoga. Lekin, yeh sabhi kary aapko aapke liye samanvay aur kriyashil roop se karne honge.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Syllabus ko samjhein aur apne pradarshankit vishayon par dhyan dena zaroori hai. Aapko apne vittiya gunvatta bhi samajhna hoga, jo ki is bharti mein khaas kar jaroori hai. Lekin, ye kuch jyada jaroori bhi nahi hai, kyuki yeh bhi aapke vyaktitva aur sammelan pe nirbhar karti hai.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Form bardasht karne ke liye apne vyaktigat sambandhon ki vyakhya karna zaroori hai. Aapko apne vyaktitva, samajik sambandhon, apne parivaar aur saathiyon ke beech kya rachna hai aur aap kaise unke saath kaise kaam karte hain. Yeh sab kuch aapko apne form bharne ke alawa online registration form mein bhi bharna hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya main is bharti ke liye eligible hu?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aap koi bhi vyakti ho sakte hain jinka upalabdhi, vyaktitva aur sammelan Delhi Fire Service ke nirdharit kriterion aur gunvattaon ke anusaar hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya main is bharti ke liye online form bhar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haa, yeh bharti online form se bharne ke liye avsarpann hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mujhe form bharne ke liye konsi vyaktigat gunvatta honi chahiye?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapko apne vyaktitva aur sammelan bhi behtar karne chahiye, aapka vyaktigat vishayon par niyamit roop se nirbhar karke nahi hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Form ke saath koi fees pad sakta hai kya?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, yeh bharti mein aapko kuch fees bhi deni hogi.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya mujhe syllabus samajhne ki jarurat hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haa, aapko syllabus ko samajhna hoga, lekin yeh kuch jadah bhi nahi hai, kyuki aapke vyaktitva aur sammelan pe nirbhar karte hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mujhe kitne sal tak koi sambhavta hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapko apni upalabdhi aur vyaktigat vishayon ke hisaab se nirdharit karta hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya is bharti ke liye koi physical test ki prakriya hote hain?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, yeh bharti mein aapko physical test bhi karne honge ki aapko kya karni pad sakti hai. Lekin, aapko apne vyaktigat vishayon ke hisaab se aapko koi kharabai nahi hoti hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Mujhe salary ke bare mein puchne ke liye kya puchiya ja raha hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Yeh bharati ke liye aapko in-hand salary ke bare mein kuch aakarshak bhaavanaaon aur sambandh hote hain, jo ki aapke vyaktigat vishayon ke hisaab se nirbhar karte hain.

jobs.ai_h1: HKRN Ke Liye 7,600 Sambhavit Bharti, Apne Liye Ek Naya Rozgar
jobs.ai_title: HKRN Overseas Recruitment 2026: Sambhavit 7600+ Posts ke liye Apply Kare
jobs.ai_meta_description: Haryana Kaushal Rozgar Nigam (HKRN) ke paas 7,600+ Sambhavit Posts ki bharti, apne liye aaj hi apply karein!
jobs.ai_overview: Aap sabhi job seekers, is khabar se bahut khush honge ki Haryana Kaushal Rozgar Nigam (HKRN) ne apni nayi bharti ki ghoshna ki hai. Ismein lagbhag 7,600 sambhavit posts hain, jismein ITI, Diploma aur Graduate level se candidate shamil honge. Kya aap bhi is bharti ka intezar kar rahe the?
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Yah bharti Haryana ke vyaktiyon ke liye ek bahut hi acchi opportunity hai. Lekin competitive level bahut high hai, isliye aapko apne lakshiyon ko clear karna hoga aur apne kaam ko karte waqt ek professional approach ka pata hoga. Sabse accha hai ki aapne apne skills, knowledge aur experience ko samjhte honge. Agar aapne itni hi skills nahin hain, toh aao apne aap ko sudharna chunke is bharti ke liye taiyar karte hain.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Iss bharti ke liye aapko apne qualifications, age aur experience ke hisaab se check karna hoga. Agar aap ITI pass hain, Graduate hain ya Diploma hain, toh aap is liye apply kar sakte hain. Aapko apne education certificate, experience certificate, aur anya documents ki jaroorat hoigee.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Aapko apne preparation ke liye ek time frame banane honge. Aapko apne syllabus ko study karna hoga, aur ek practice plan bhi banane honge. Aapko apne strong points aur weak points ke bare mein pata hone hoga, tabhi aapko is bharti mein success mil sakti hai. Apne preparation ke dauran aapko apne skills aur knowledge ko update karna hoga.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Is bharti k liye salary bahut achhi hai. Aapke in-hand salary ke bare mein jankari nahi di gayi hai, lekin aapko ye jaankari dena chahiye ki is bharti ke liye aapko in-hand salary ki jaroorat ho sakti hai. Aapke salary ke hisaab se aap apne jeevan ko accha bana payenge, aur apne parivaar ko bhi apne saath khaushaas kar payenge.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Is bharti ke liye chunav karte samay aapko ye jawab karna hoga ki aap is job ki jaroorat kis baat ke liye rakhenge? Aapko apne responsibilities ko clear karna hoga, aur aapne performance kis tarah se check kege. Aapko apne seniors, colleagues aur team se kaam karna hoga, iske liye aapko ek good team player ka pata hona bahut zaroori hoga.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Aapko apne selection ke dauran aapko apne skills, knowledge aur experience ka pata hona hoga. Aapko apne test kis tarah se paa sakte hain, aur aapke mistakes ke bare mein soch sakte hain. Aapko apne preparation ke dauran ek strategy banane honge, jisse aapko ek acchi performance de sakte hain.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Aapko apne application ki jaroorat hoigee, iske liye aapko apne resume ko update karna hoga, aur ek cover letter bhi likhna hoga. Aapko apne application form ko online submit karna hoga, aur apne fee ko online submit karna hoga. Aapko apne documents ka kisi bhi type ki jaroorat ho sakti hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Main is bharti ke liye apply kar sakta hoon? - Ismein ITI, Diploma ya Graduate hui candidates ka kya role hai?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Iss bharti ke liye, ITI, Diploma ya Graduate hui candidates ka role hai. Aapko apne qualifications aur experience ke hisaab se check karna hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Is bharti mein salary kitni hui? - Ismein aapke salary, da, bonus, aur anya incentives ke bare mein jankari dena hoga?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapne in-hand salary k liye jankari deni chahiye, agar aapki salary ke bare mein pata hai to dena chaahiye. Aapke da, bonus, aur anya incentives ke bare mein bhi jankari deni chahiye, agar aapko pata hai to dena chahiye.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Main iss bharti ke liye apply karna chahta hoon - Lekin mera itihasaasik sanchaar ka adhikaran bada hai, kya main bhi ismein shamil ho sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aapka itihasaasik sanchaar adhikaran ka pata hone ke baavjood, aap ismein shamil ho sakte hain yadi aapka qualification match hota hai aur aapko required skill hone padte hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Bharti ke liye kya aapke age limit hai? Yadi main aage aapke age limit hai, to main apply kar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Bharti ke liye aapke minimum age 21 year hain aur maximum age limit 35 year 05 year ki age relaxation ke saath. Agar aapka age aage hai, to aap ismein apply nahi kar sakte.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Main apne resume ko update karna chunke is bharti ke liye apply kar sakta hoon? Lekin maine apna previous resume 5 saal pehle banaaya tha, to main ismein apply kar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, aap apne previous resume ko upyog kar sakte hain, lekin aapko apna latest resume update karna hoga aur aapko apne skills, qualifications aur experience ka pata hona hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya main is bharti ke liye online apply kar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, aap is bharti ke liye online apply kar sakte hain. Aapko apne application ko online submit karna hoga aur apne fee ko online submit karna hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Main is bharti ke liye apply kar sakta hoon, lekin maine apna qualification 5 saal pehle complete kiya tha, to main ismein apply kar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Nahin, aapko apne qualifications ki jaroorat hoigee, jise aapko 5 saal pehle complete kiya tha, to aap ismein apply nahi kar sakte.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya main is bharti ke liye apply karna chahta hoon, lekin maine apni qualification 2 saal pehle complete ki hi hui hai, to main ismein apply kar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Aap ismein apply kar sakte hain, lekin aapki qualification 2 saal pehle complete ki hui hai aur aapko required skills aur experience hone padtega.

ai_schema_faq.answer: Iss bharti ke liye, ITI, Diploma ya Graduate hui candidates ka role hai. Aapko apne qualifications aur experience ke hisaab se check karna hoga.

jobs.ai_meta_description: India Post GDS 5th Merit List 2026 Download: Aapki Yeh Pehli Information, Kya Aap Bhi GDS Recruitment Main Bhag Lenge?
jobs.ai_overview: Ek Baat Hai, agar aap bhi India Post GDS Recruitment ka liye apply karne wale hain, to aaj ke news ke baad aapke liye bahut hi acchi khabar hai. Department of Posts ne 5th Merit List 2026 ki official jankari ki hai. Ab aap GDS Grameen Dak Sevak ka vacancy details download kar sakte hain, iske sath hi sahi tarike se apply karne ke liye important dates aur last date ka khas dhyan rakhte hain.
jobs.ai_expert_analysis: Form bharte waqt aapko puri vyavastha rakhti hai. Yeh ek competitive exam hai, aur aapko pahle se se syllabus par dhyan dena hoga. Aapko yeh bhi dekhna hoga ki aapka competition kitni tough hoga, aur kitne candidates ke against aapka selection ho sakta hai.
jobs.ai_who_should_apply: Yeh GDS Recruitment kaafi achha opportunity hai, jahan main aapko sambhavy hai ki aapki job fixed karke rahegi. Agar aap graduate hai, ya graduation ke liye padh rahe hain, to aapko yeh vacancy bahut hi suitable hain. Aapka age 18 se 40 tak hona chahiye.
jobs.ai_preparation_tips: Yeh exam kaafi achha hain, lekin aapko yeh pahle se se syllabus pe kafi mehnat karni pad sakti hai. Sabse pehle aapky pass official syllabus download karna hai, aur phir uske baad aapka self-study karna shauroop hai.
jobs.ai_salary_insights: Yeh GDS Recruitment ka salary pahle se hi declare kiya gaya hai. Jo candidate selected hoga, unki salary 10,000 rupees/month se 18,000 rupees/month tak hoga. Aapko ismein kiye jaane wale allowances bhi milega.
jobs.ai_job_profile_analysis: Yeh job ghar-bhar ke bahar kaam karne wali hai. Aapko postal service kaam karna hoga, aur aapko daily 2 ghante se 5 ghante kaam karna hoga. Aapko apni duty ko puri tarah se fulfill karna hoga.
jobs.ai_selection_strategy: Yeh competitive exam hai, lekin aapko sambhav hai ki aap usmein aage badh sakte hai. Aapko syllabus par pahle se se dhyan dena hoga, aur phir uska practical test karna padega.
jobs.ai_how_to_apply_rewrite: Toh aapki aisi koi shakti nahi hai, jise apply karna kuch problem banne. Apne official website par aapko ek direct link mil jayega, jahan aap online apply kar sakte hain. Form bharne ke liye aapko puri vyavastha rakhti hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Kya main GDS Recruitment ka online form bhar sakta hoon?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Haan, aap online form bhar sakte hain. Apne official website par aapko direct link mil jayega.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Main GDS Recruitment ka apply karne se pehle, kaise chun lunga ki main apply kar sakta hoon ya nahi?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Yeh bahut hi simple hai. Apne eligibility criteria check karein, aur phir uske baad aap online apply kar sakte hain.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Main GDS Recruitment ka exam dono language mein dene wala hoon, kaise aapka syllabus hoga?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Yeh syllabus official website par aapko upload hoga.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: Main GDS Recruitment ka form kaise bhare? Kya mujhe koi help chahiye?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Form bharne ke liye aapko puri vyavastha rakhti hai. Apne official website par aapko direct link mil jayega.

ai_expanded_faqs.question: GDS Recruitment ka exam kaha hoga?
ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Yeh exam ka location official website par aapko mention kiya gaya hai.

ai_expanded_faqs.answer: Yeh bahut hi simple hai. Apne syllabus par pahle se se koi mehnat karein, aur phir uske baad aapke saath aage badhne ka chance ho sakta hai.

rows.text: Central Council for Research in Unani Medicine (CCRUM) CCRUM Group A, B & C Posts Recruitment 2026 Advt. No. : 01/2026 Short Details of Notification
Starting Date : 01/07/2026 Last Date : 31/07/2026 11:59 PM Correction Date : 03-05 August 2026

Processing Fees (For All Posts) For All Candidates : 500/- Examination Fees (Group A Post) General / OBC : 1500/- EWS / SC / ST / PH : 0/- All Females / ESM : 0/- Examination Fees (Group B Posts) General / OBC : 1000/- EWS / SC / ST / PH : 0/- All Females / ESM : 0/- Examination Fees (Group C Posts) General / OBC : 800/- EWS / SC / ST / PH : 0/- All Females / ESM : 0/- Payment Mode : Online Mode
Age Limit : Given Below Age Limit as on : 31/07/2026 The Age Relaxation Extra as per Rules.
CBT Written Examination Interview (For Research Officer Only) Skill Test (If Applicable) Medical Examination Document Verification

Research Officer (Unani) : Post Graduate Degree (MD or MS) in Unani System of Medicine from any University/Institution recognized by NCISM (Formerly known as CCIM) and Enrolment on the Central Registrar of NCISM/CCIM or State Register of Unani/ISM. Research Officer (Pathology) : M.D. in Pathology from an MCI recognized University/Institution and Enrolment on the Central Register of MCI or State Register of Medical Council. Research Officer (Physiology) : Master’s Degree in Molecular Biology/Biotechnology/Human Genetics/Genetics Engineering from a recognized University/Institution and 03 years’ experience after obtaining Master’s degree in relevant subject in a recognized Research/Academic Institution/Laboratory/Industry, OR Ph.D. after Master’s degree in above subject/areas. Assistant Research Officer (Pharmacology) : M.Sc in Pharmacology or M.V.Sc Degree from a recognized University/Institution and Aptitude for research in the line.
